functions.name: llmling_models.log.get_logger
documentation:
Get a logger for the given name.

Args:
    name: The name of the logger, will be prefixed with 'llmling_agent.'

Returns:
    A logger instance

methods.name: llmling_models.types.StringModel.agent_model
documentation: Create agent model from string name.

modules.name: llmling_models.base
documentation: Base class for YAML-configurable pydantic-ai models.

classes.name: llmling_models.base.PydanticModel
documentation: Base for models that can be configured via YAML.

classes.name: llmling_models.multi.MultiModel

methods.name: llmling_models.multi.MultiModel.available_models
documentation: Convert model names/instances to pydantic-ai Model instances.

Base for model configurations that combine multiple language models.

This provides the base interface for YAML-configurable multi-model setups,
allowing configuration of multiple models through LLMling's config system.

classes.name: llmling_models.multi.RandomMultiModel

methods.name: llmling_models.multi.RandomMultiModel.agent_model
documentation: Create agent model that randomly selects from available models.

Randomly selects from configured models.

Example YAML configuration:
    ```yaml
    model:
      type: random
      models:
        - openai:gpt-4
        - openai:gpt-3.5-turbo
    ```

classes.name: llmling_models.multi.RandomAgentModel

methods.name: llmling_models.multi.RandomAgentModel.request
documentation: Make request using randomly selected model.
AgentModel that randomly selects from available models.

classes.name: llmling_models.multi.FallbackMultiModel

methods.name: llmling_models.multi.FallbackMultiModel.agent_model
documentation: Create agent model that implements fallback strategy.

Tries models in sequence until one succeeds.

Example YAML configuration:
    ```yaml
    model:
      type: fallback
      models:
        - openai:gpt-4  # Try this first
        - openai:gpt-3.5-turbo  # Fall back to this if gpt-4 fails
        - ollama:llama2  # Last resort
    ```

methods.name: llmling_models.multi.FallbackAgentModel.__init__
documentation: Initialize with ordered list of models.

methods.name: llmling_models.multi.FallbackAgentModel.request
documentation: Try each model in sequence until one succeeds.
